tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_worker_spaw: Summons a peaceful Swarm worker that mines, gathers and hauls loot to a stash.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_scrap: Alien scrap. The basic salvage currency - drops from slain swarm, used in crafts and black-market trades.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_credit: Cosmic credit. Rare black-market currency for expensive blueprints and gear.
tooltip.alien-invasion.uranium_dust: Uranium dust. Refined from uranium ore; feeds uranium rods and gear.
tooltip.alien-invasion.uranium_rod: Uranium rod. Component for uranium tools/armour and drill fuel cells.
tooltip.alien-invasion.xenocrystal: Xenocrystal. Purified alien crystal used in advanced crafts and optics.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_fiber: Bio-fiber. Organic material from infested tissue - used in bio-gear and filters.
tooltip.alien-invasion.plasma_core: Plasma core. Energy core for plasma weapons/tools and stations.
tooltip.alien-invasion.iridium_plate: Iridium plate. Ultra-durable top-tier armour/tool blank.
tooltip.alien-invasion.dark_matter_shard: Dark matter shard. The rarest end-game resource for the strongest crafts.
tooltip.alien-invasion.uranium_sword: Uranium sword. Sturdy mid-tier melee weapon.
tooltip.alien-invasion.uranium_pickaxe: Uranium pickaxe. Fast mid-tier mining of stone and ores.
tooltip.alien-invasion.uranium_axe: Uranium axe. Chops wood and hits hard.
tooltip.alien-invasion.uranium_shovel: Uranium shovel. Fast digging of dirt, sand and gravel.
tooltip.alien-invasion.uranium_hoe: Uranium hoe. Tills soil for farming.
tooltip.alien-invasion.plasma_sword: Plasma sword. Fire-proof high-tier weapon with high damage.
tooltip.alien-invasion.plasma_pickaxe: Plasma pickaxe. Fire-proof, very fast mining.
tooltip.alien-invasion.plasma_axe: Plasma axe. Fire-proof, powerful vs wood and foes.
tooltip.alien-invasion.iridium_pickaxe: Iridium pickaxe. Ultra-durable, mines almost anything.
tooltip.alien-invasion.iridium_axe: Iridium axe. Ultra-durable, high damage vs wood and foes.
tooltip.alien-invasion.toxic_water_bucke: Bucket of toxic water. Places toxic water - harms creatures and plants.
tooltip.alien-invasion.geiger_counter: Geiger counter. Reads the radiation field and your accumulated dose; ticks while held.
tooltip.alien-invasion.portable_purifier: Portable purifier. Cleanses nearby infested blocks and cuts your radiation dose.
tooltip.alien-invasion.rad_pills: Rad pills. Flush most of your accumulated radiation dose.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_filter_mask: Bio-filter mask. Worn on the head, halves radiation intake.
tooltip.alien-invasion.contaminated_food: Contaminated food. Fills hunger but irradiates you - a last resort.
tooltip.alien-invasion.purified_water_fl: Purified water flask. A clean water reserve for cleansing/crafts.
tooltip.alien-invasion.plasma_bolt: Plasma bolt. The Alien Blaster's glowing round.
tooltip.alien-invasion.pure_radiation_bl: Radiation Crystal Ore. Rapidly fills the Irradiation bar on approach. Aliens are immune. Drops a radiation crystal.
tooltip.alien-invasion.radiation_crystal: Raw radiation crystal. Carrying it without a full hazmat suit irradiates you to death.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_chunk: Chunk of platinum from infected coal ore. Craft 9 into raw platinum.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_chunk: Chunk of palladium from infected copper ore. Craft 9 into raw palladium.
tooltip.alien-invasion.raw_platinum: Raw platinum. Smelt in a BLAST FURNACE ONLY to get an ingot.
tooltip.alien-invasion.raw_palladium: Raw palladium. Smelt in a BLAST FURNACE ONLY to get an ingot.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_ingot: Platinum ingot. 4 platinum + 4 palladium make Nibirium alloy.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_ingot: Palladium ingot. 4 platinum + 4 palladium make Nibirium alloy.
tooltip.alien-invasion.nibirium_ingot: Nibirium - a tough platinum/palladium alloy. Base for hazmat-grade gear and tools.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_skin: Alien hide. From slain aliens or the alien-flesh block. Base for a light hazmat suit.
tooltip.alien-invasion.platinum_ore: Infected coal ore (day 2+). Mine with an iron pickaxe or better for platinum chunks.
tooltip.alien-invasion.palladium_ore: Infected copper ore (day 2+). Mine with an iron pickaxe or better for palladium chunks.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_flesh: Infected iron ore (day 2+). Cut with a sword or shears for alien skin.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_diamond_: Infected diamond ore (day 4+). Still drops a diamond.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_lapis_or: Infected lapis ore (day 4+). Still drops lapis.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_redstone: Infected redstone ore (day 4+). Still drops redstone.
tooltip.alien-invasion.light_hazmat_helm: Light hazmat (alien skin). Full set blocks light radiation and corrupted-ground infection. Upgrade with Nibirium.
tooltip.alien-invasion.light_hazmat_ches: Light hazmat (alien skin). Full set blocks light radiation and corrupted-ground infection. Upgrade with Nibirium.
tooltip.alien-invasion.light_hazmat_legg: Light hazmat (alien skin). Full set blocks light radiation and corrupted-ground infection. Upgrade with Nibirium.
tooltip.alien-invasion.light_hazmat_boot: Light hazmat (alien skin). Full set blocks light radiation and corrupted-ground infection. Upgrade with Nibirium.
tooltip.alien-invasion.nibirium_sword: Nibirium sword. Netherite-grade; every hit cleaves nearby foes.
tooltip.alien-invasion.nibirium_pickaxe: Nibirium pickaxe. Netherite-grade; breaks a 3x3 area.
tooltip.alien-invasion.nibirium_shovel: Nibirium shovel. Netherite-grade; digs a 3x3 area.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infected_water_bu: Infected water. Looks corrupted but is harmless and swims exactly like normal water.
tooltip.alien-invasion.sky_drone_spawn_e: Spawns a flying drone that dives at airborne players - no safety in the sky.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cave_lurker_spawn: Spawns a fast wall-climbing ambusher that hunts you underground.
tooltip.alien-invasion.acid_spitter_spaw: Spawns a ranged alien that lobs corrosive acid globs.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_grunt_spawn: Spawns a basic foot soldier of the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.telekinetic_alien: Spawns an alien that throws blocks using telekinesis.
tooltip.alien-invasion.ufo_spawn_egg: Spawns a flying saucer that abducts creatures.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_brute_spawn: Spawns a heavily armored alien brute tank.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_chicken_spa: Spawns a chicken that fires marker bolts (tags you for the swarm).
tooltip.alien-invasion.hive_tyrant_spawn: Spawns a radioactive boss tyrant of the Swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_troll_spawn: Spawns a sneaky troll that steals item drops.
tooltip.alien-invasion.drill_spawn_egg: Spawns an alien mining drill that bores downwards.
tooltip.alien-invasion.meteor_spawn_egg: Spawns a falling meteor that impacts the terrain.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_stalker_spa: Spawns a fast, camouflaged stalker alien.
tooltip.alien-invasion.hive_shaman_spawn: Spawns a Hive shaman that buffs and heals other aliens.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_breacher_sp: Spawns a heavy alien specialized in breaching bases.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_player_c: Spawns an aggressive clone carrying the player's old gear.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_creeper_: Spawns a creeper that disperses acid upon exploding.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_skeleton: Spawns a skeleton that shoots radioactive projectiles.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_zombie_s: Spawns a zombie that shields itself from frontal damage.
tooltip.alien-invasion.swarm_mother_spaw: Spawns the final Mother of the Swarm boss.
tooltip.alien-invasion.parasite_item: A brain parasite. Hijacks player control when worn on the head.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_alloy: A strong metallic compound retrieved from alien wreckage.
tooltip.alien-invasion.hive_core: A highly concentrated alien energy source.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_flesh: Highly nutritious when eaten raw, but zero value if cooked.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_shard: A dense crystalline shard mined from cosmic ore.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_ingot: A refined cosmic alloy used to craft heavy cosmic gear.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_battery: A capsule of stored energy. Powers turrets and tech weapons.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_serum: Extraterrestrial antidote. Purges infection, radiation, and pressure.
tooltip.alien-invasion.weak_antidote: A simple antidote made from alien flesh. Clears stage 1 & 2 infection.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_blade: Top-tier blade: drains life, infects, pierces alien armour. Right-click for a Bio-Nova AoE pulse.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_stimulant: Combat stim. Instantly heals and grants Resistance, Absorption, Regen, Speed and Strength.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_grappling_hoo: Pulls player to blocks or pulls targets closer.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_warhammer: Heavy hammer. Right-click slams the ground to release a shockwave.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_pickaxe: Super excavator: near-instant mining of stone and ores.
tooltip.alien-invasion.star_cleaver: Cosmic battle-axe. Strikes cleave nearby foes; bonus damage vs the swarm.
tooltip.alien-invasion.blink_core: Right-click to blink ~9 blocks forward and escape. Grants Resistance + Speed.
tooltip.alien-invasion.comms_beacon: Right-click to broadcast your position to every player. Co-op rally tool.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_pickaxe: Locates cosmic ore deposits when mining.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_axe: Instantly fells entire trees by breaking the base block.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_shovel: Digs out a wide 3x3 footprint of dirt and sand.
tooltip.alien-invasion.bio_hoe: Tills land in a 3x3 grid and auto-plants seeds from inventory.
tooltip.alien-invasion.gravity_gun: Picks up and suspends entities. Left-click to launch them.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_blaster: Fires plasma. 30-round magazine - reload with Plasma Cells (sneak+use). Unaffected by EMP.
tooltip.alien-invasion.plasma_cell: Ammo for the Alien Blaster. One cell fully reloads the 30-round magazine.
tooltip.alien-invasion.rally_banner: Right-click to rally your squad: Regen, Resistance, Speed & Absorption to all players nearby.
tooltip.alien-invasion.gravity_grenade: Throwable singularity that floats entities into the air.
tooltip.alien-invasion.purifier_wand: Cleanses alien ground and stone back to standard blocks.
tooltip.alien-invasion.invasion_tracker: Recon scanner: locates the nearest alien structure & cosmic ore (distance + bearing) and makes nearby aliens glow through walls.
tooltip.alien-invasion.hazmat_helmet: Protects your face from toxic airborne spores.
tooltip.alien-invasion.hazmat_chestplate: Heavy protective jacket. Full set immunizes against radiation.
tooltip.alien-invasion.hazmat_boots: Lined rubber boots to walk safely around radioactive ore.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_helmet: Protects the head. Part of the set that prevents infection.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_chestplate: Heavy cosmic armor piece. Prevents block infection with full set.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_boots: Cosmic boots. Part of the set that prevents infection.
tooltip.alien-invasion.chitin_helmet: Organic chitin plate. Cheap mid-tier protection.
tooltip.alien-invasion.chitin_chestplate: Grown from alien chitin. Full set purges Infection, Poison and Hunger.
tooltip.alien-invasion.chitin_boots: Light chitin boots. Part of the anti-infection set.
tooltip.alien-invasion.gravity_boots: Grants fall damage immunity, low gravity, and double-jumps.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_block: A solid, heavy block of refined cosmic ingot.
tooltip.alien-invasion.purifier: Cleanses adjacent alien grass and residue back into soil.
tooltip.alien-invasion.plasma_turret: Auto-defensive sentry. Right-click with Alien Battery to charge.
tooltip.alien-invasion.swarm_beacon: Summons the Swarm Mother boss when clicked on Day 8+.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_stone: Stone corrupted by the Swarm. Extremely soft to mine.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_grass: Rotten organic grass. Slows player movement significantly.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_log: Wood block infused with alien parasitic fibers.
tooltip.alien-invasion.infested_leaves: Decaying leaves that harbor toxic spores.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_crystal: Emits strong light, but inflicts radiation in a 5-block radius.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_hive: Organic alien nest. Spawns defensive grunts when night falls.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_residue: Viscous slime that corrupts adjacent soil and grass.
tooltip.alien-invasion.cosmic_ore: Radioactive ore block. Inflicts radiation to players without Hazmat suits.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_beacon: Orbital laser tagger. Spawns defenders and targets a blast radius.
tooltip.alien-invasion.alien_stash: Alien chest. Used by trolls and workers to store stolen goods.
tooltip.alien-invasion.emp_grenade: Throwable technological weapon that disables UFOs, alien drills, and electrical suits.
tooltip.alien-invasion.herbal_salve: Cheap herbal salve. Resets stage-1 infection progress and grants brief regeneration.
upgrade.alien-invasion.nibirium.base_slo: Add a diamond tool, weapon, or Hazmat Suit piece
